# frozen_string_literal: true

class RemoveStatusService < BaseService
  include Redisable
  include Payloadable
  include Lockable

  # Delete a status
  # @param   [Status] status
  # @param   [Hash] options
  # @option  [Boolean] :redraft
  # @option  [Boolean] :immediate
  # @option  [Boolean] :preserve
  # @option  [Boolean] :original_removed
  # @option  [Boolean] :skip_streaming
  def call(status, **options)
    @payload  = { event: :delete, payload: status.id.to_s }.to_json
    @status   = status
    @account  = status.account
    @options  = options

    with_redis_lock("distribute:#{@status.id}") do
      @status.discard_with_reblogs

      StatusPin.find_by(status: @status)&.destroy

      remove_from_self if @account.local?
      remove_from_followers
      remove_from_lists

      # There is no reason to send out Undo activities when the
      # cause is that the original object has been removed, since
      # original object being removed implicitly removes reblogs
      # of it. The Delete activity of the original is forwarded
      # separately.
      remove_from_remote_reach if @account.local? && !@options[:original_removed]

      # Since reblogs don't mention anyone, don't get reblogged,
      # favourited and don't contain their own media attachments
      # or hashtags, this can be skipped
      unless @status.reblog?
        remove_from_mentions
        remove_reblogs
        remove_from_hashtags
        remove_from_public
        remove_from_media if @status.with_media?
        remove_media
      end

      # Revoke the quote while we get a chance… maybe this should be a `before_destroy` hook?
      RevokeQuoteService.new.call(@status.quote) if @status.quote&.quoted_account&.local? && @status.quote&.accepted?

      @status.destroy! if permanently?
    end
  end

  private

  # The following FeedManager calls all do not result in redis publishes for
  # streaming, as the `:update` option is false

  def remove_from_self
    FeedManager.instance.unpush_from_home(@account, @status)
  end

  def remove_from_followers
    @account.followers_for_local_distribution.includes(:user).reorder(nil).find_each do |follower|
      FeedManager.instance.unpush_from_home(follower, @status)
    end
  end

  def remove_from_lists
    @account.lists_for_local_distribution.select(:id, :account_id).includes(account: :user).reorder(nil).find_each do |list|
      FeedManager.instance.unpush_from_list(list, @status)
    end
  end

  def remove_from_mentions
    # For limited visibility statuses, the mentions that determine
    # who receives them in their home feed are a subset of followers
    # and therefore the delete is already handled by sending it to all
    # followers. Here we send a delete to actively mentioned accounts
    # that may not follow the account

    return if skip_streaming?

    @status.active_mentions.find_each do |mention|
      redis.publish("timeline:#{mention.account_id}", @payload)
    end
  end

  def remove_from_remote_reach
    # Followers, relays, people who got mentioned in the status,
    # or who reblogged it from someone else might not follow
    # the author and wouldn't normally receive the delete
    # notification - so here, we explicitly send it to them

    status_reach_finder = StatusReachFinder.new(@status, unsafe: true)

    ActivityPub::DeliveryWorker.push_bulk(status_reach_finder.inboxes, limit: 1_000) do |inbox_url|
      [signed_activity_json, @account.id, inbox_url]
    end
  end

  def signed_activity_json
    @signed_activity_json ||= serialize_payload(@status, @status.reblog? ? ActivityPub::UndoAnnounceSerializer : ActivityPub::DeleteNoteSerializer, signer: @account, always_sign: true).to_json
  end

  def remove_reblogs
    # We delete reblogs of the status before the original status,
    # because once original status is gone, reblogs will disappear
    # without us being able to do all the fancy stuff

    @status.reblogs.rewhere(deleted_at: [nil, @status.deleted_at]).includes(:account).reorder(nil).find_each do |reblog|
      RemoveStatusService.new.call(reblog, original_removed: true, skip_streaming: skip_streaming?)
    end
  end

  def remove_from_hashtags
    @account.featured_tags.where(tag_id: @status.tags.map(&:id)).find_each do |featured_tag|
      featured_tag.decrement(@status)
    end

    return unless @status.public_visibility?

    return if skip_streaming?

    @status.tags.map(&:name).each do |hashtag|
      redis.publish("timeline:hashtag:#{hashtag.downcase}", @payload)
      redis.publish("timeline:hashtag:#{hashtag.downcase}:local", @payload) if @status.local?
    end
  end

  def remove_from_public
    return unless @status.public_visibility?

    return if skip_streaming?

    redis.publish('timeline:public', @payload)
    redis.publish(@status.local? ? 'timeline:public:local' : 'timeline:public:remote', @payload)
  end

  def remove_from_media
    return unless @status.public_visibility?

    return if skip_streaming?

    redis.publish('timeline:public:media', @payload)
    redis.publish(@status.local? ? 'timeline:public:local:media' : 'timeline:public:remote:media', @payload)
  end

  def remove_media
    return if @options[:redraft]

    if permanently?
      @status.media_attachments.destroy_all
    else
      UpdateMediaAttachmentsPermissionsService.new.call(@status.media_attachments, :private)
    end
  end

  def permanently?
    @options[:immediate] || !(@options[:preserve] || @status.reported?)
  end

  def skip_streaming?
    !!@options[:skip_streaming]
  end
end

file.content:
# frozen_string_literal: true

class StatusFilter
  attr_reader :status, :account

  def initialize(status, account)
    @status              = status
    @account             = account
  end

  def filtered?
    return false if !account.nil? && account.id == status.account_id

    blocked_by_policy? || (account_present? && filtered_status?) || silenced_account?
  end

  def filter_state_for_quote
    if !account.nil? && account.id == status.account_id
      nil
    elsif blocked_by_policy?
      'unauthorized'
    elsif account_present? && blocking_domain?
      'blocked_domain'
    elsif account_present? && blocking_account?
      'blocked_account'
    elsif account_present? && muting_account?
      'muted_account'
    end
  end

  private

  def account_present?
    !account.nil?
  end

  def filtered_status?
    blocking_account? || blocking_domain? || muting_account?
  end

  def blocking_account?
    account.blocking?(status.account_id)
  end

  def blocking_domain?
    account.domain_blocking?(status.account_domain)
  end

  def muting_account?
    account.muting?(status.account_id)
  end

  def silenced_account?
    status_account_silenced? && !account_following_status_account?
  end

  def status_account_silenced?
    status.account.silenced?
  end

  def account_following_status_account?
    account&.following?(status.account_id)
  end

  def blocked_by_policy?
    !policy_allows_show?
  end

  def policy_allows_show?
    StatusPolicy.new(account, status).show?
  end
end

     1	# frozen_string_literal: true
     2	
     3	class StatusPolicy < ApplicationPolicy
     4	  def show?
     5	    return false if author.unavailable?
     6	
     7	    if requires_mention?
     8	      owned? || mention_exists?
     9	    elsif private?
    10	      owned? || following_author? || mention_exists?
    11	    else
    12	      current_account.nil? || (!author_blocking? && !author_blocking_domain?)
    13	    end
    14	  end
    15	
    16	  def quote?
    17	    show? && !blocking_author? && record.quote_policy_for_account(current_account) != :denied
    18	  end
    19	
    20	  def reblog?
    21	    !requires_mention? && (!private? || owned?) && show? && !blocking_author?
    22	  end
    23	
    24	  def favourite?
    25	    show? && !blocking_author?
    26	  end
    27	
    28	  def destroy?
    29	    owned?
    30	  end
    31	
    32	  alias unreblog? destroy?
    33	
    34	  def update?
    35	    owned?
    36	  end
    37	
    38	  private
    39	
    40	  def requires_mention?
    41	    record.direct_visibility? || record.limited_visibility?
    42	  end
    43	
    44	  def owned?
    45	    author.id == current_account&.id
    46	  end
    47	
    48	  def private?
    49	    record.private_visibility?
    50	  end
    51	
    52	  def mention_exists?
    53	    return false if current_account.nil?
    54	
    55	    if record.mentions.loaded?
    56	      record.mentions.any? { |mention| mention.account_id == current_account.id }
    57	    else
    58	      record.mentions.exists?(account: current_account)
    59	    end
    60	  end
    61	
    62	  def author_blocking_domain?
    63	    return false if current_account.nil? || current_account.domain.nil?
    64	
    65	    author.domain_blocking?(current_account.domain)
    66	  end
    67	
    68	  def blocking_author?
    69	    return false if current_account.nil?
    70	
    71	    current_account.blocking?(author)
    72	  end
    73	
    74	  def author_blocking?
    75	    return false if current_account.nil?
    76	
    77	    current_account.blocked_by?(author)
    78	  end
    79	
    80	  def following_author?
    81	    return false if current_account.nil?
    82	
    83	    current_account.following?(author)
    84	  end
    85	
    86	  def author
    87	    record.account
    88	  end
    89	end

     1	# frozen_string_literal: true
     2	
     3	class StatusReachFinder
     4	  # @param [Status] status
     5	  # @param [Hash] options
     6	  # @option options [Boolean] :unsafe
     7	  def initialize(status, options = {})
     8	    @status  = status
     9	    @options = options
    10	  end
    11	
    12	  def inboxes
    13	    (reached_account_inboxes + followers_inboxes + relay_inboxes).uniq
    14	  end
    15	
    16	  private
    17	
    18	  def reached_account_inboxes
    19	    scope = Account.where(id: reached_account_ids)
    20	    inboxes_without_suspended_for(scope)
    21	  end
    22	
    23	  def reached_account_ids
    24	    # When the status is a reblog, there are no interactions with it
    25	    # directly, we assume all interactions are with the original one
    26	
    27	    if @status.reblog?
    28	      [reblog_of_account_id]
    29	    else
    30	      [
    31	        replied_to_account_id,
    32	        reblog_of_account_id,
    33	        quote_of_account_id,
    34	        mentioned_account_ids,
    35	        reblogs_account_ids,
    36	        quotes_account_ids,
    37	        favourites_account_ids,
    38	        replies_account_ids,
    39	      ].tap do |arr|
    40	        arr.flatten!
    41	        arr.compact!
    42	        arr.uniq!
    43	      end
    44	    end
    45	  end
    46	
    47	  def replied_to_account_id
    48	    @status.in_reply_to_account_id if distributable?
    49	  end
    50	
    51	  def quote_of_account_id
    52	    @status.quote&.quoted_account_id
    53	  end
    54	
    55	  def reblog_of_account_id
    56	    @status.reblog.account_id if @status.reblog?
    57	  end
    58	
    59	  def mentioned_account_ids
    60	    @status.mentions.pluck(:account_id)
    61	  end
    62	
    63	  # Beware: Quotes can be created without the author having had access to the status
    64	  def quotes_account_ids
    65	    @status.quotes.pluck(:account_id) if distributable? || unsafe?
    66	  end
    67	
    68	  # Beware: Reblogs can be created without the author having had access to the status
    69	  def reblogs_account_ids
    70	    @status.reblogs.rewhere(deleted_at: [nil, @status.deleted_at]).pluck(:account_id) if distributable? || unsafe?
    71	  end
    72	
    73	  # Beware: Favourites can be created without the author having had access to the status
    74	  def favourites_account_ids
    75	    @status.favourites.pluck(:account_id) if distributable? || unsafe?
    76	  end
    77	
    78	  # Beware: Replies can be created without the author having had access to the status
    79	  def replies_account_ids
    80	    @status.replies.pluck(:account_id) if distributable? || unsafe?
    81	  end
    82	
    83	  def followers_inboxes
    84	    scope = followers_scope
    85	    inboxes_without_suspended_for(scope)
    86	  end
    87	
    88	  def relay_inboxes
    89	    if @status.public_visibility?
    90	      Relay.enabled.pluck(:inbox_url)
    91	    else
    92	      []
    93	    end
    94	  end
    95	
    96	  def distributable?
    97	    @status.public_visibility? || @status.unlisted_visibility?
    98	  end
    99	
   100	  def unsafe?
   101	    @options[:unsafe]
   102	  end
   103	
   104	  def followers_scope
   105	    if @status.in_reply_to_local_account? && distributable?
   106	      @status.account.followers.or(@status.thread.account.followers.not_domain_blocked_by_account(@status.account))
   107	    elsif @status.direct_visibility? || @status.limited_visibility?
   108	      Account.none
   109	    else
   110	      @status.account.followers
   111	    end
   112	  end
   113	
   114	  def inboxes_without_suspended_for(scope)
   115	    scope.merge!(Account.without_suspended) unless unsafe?
   116	    scope.inboxes
   117	  end
   118	end

     3	class StatusPolicy < ApplicationPolicy
     4	  def show?
     5	    return false if author.unavailable?
     6	
     7	    if requires_mention?
     8	      owned? || mention_exists?
     9	    elsif private?
    10	      owned? || following_author? || mention_exists?
    11	    else
    12	      current_account.nil? || (!author_blocking? && !author_blocking_domain?)
    13	    end
    14	  end
    15	
    16	  def quote?
    17	    show? && !blocking_author? && record.quote_policy_for_account(current_account) != :denied
    18	  end
    19	
    20	  def reblog?
    21	    !requires_mention? && (!private? || owned?) && show? && !blocking_author?
    22	  end
    23	
    24	  def favourite?
    25	    show? && !blocking_author?
    26	  end
    27	
    28	  def destroy?
    29	    owned?
    30	  end
    31	
    32	  alias unreblog? destroy?
    33	
    34	  def update?
    35	    owned?
    36	  end
    37	
    38	  private
    39	
    40	  def requires_mention?
    41	    record.direct_visibility? || record.limited_visibility?
    42	  end
    43	
    44	  def owned?
    45	    author.id == current_account&.id
    46	  end
    47	
    48	  def private?
    49	    record.private_visibility?
    50	  end
    51	
    52	  def mention_exists?
    53	    return false if current_account.nil?
    54	
    55	    if record.mentions.loaded?
    56	      record.mentions.any? { |mention| mention.account_id == current_account.id }
    57	    else
    58	      record.mentions.exists?(account: current_account)
    59	    end
    60	  end
    61	
    62	  def author_blocking_domain?
    63	    return false if current_account.nil? || current_account.domain.nil?
    64	
    65	    author.domain_blocking?(current_account.domain)
    66	  end
    67	
    68	  def blocking_author?
    69	    return false if current_account.nil?
    70	
    71	    current_account.blocking?(author)
    72	  end
    73	
    74	  def author_blocking?
    75	    return false if current_account.nil?
    76	
    77	    current_account.blocked_by?(author)
    78	  end
    79	
    80	  def following_author?
    81	    return false if current_account.nil?
    82	
    83	    current_account.following?(author)
    84	  end
    85	
    86	  def author
    87	    record.account
    88	  end
    89	end
===== app/lib/status_reach_finder.rb =====
     1	# frozen_string_literal: true
     2	
     3	class StatusReachFinder
     4	  # @param [Status] status
     5	  # @param [Hash] options
     6	  # @option options [Boolean] :unsafe
     7	  def initialize(status, options = {})
     8	    @status  = status
     9	    @options = options
    10	  end
    11	
    12	  def inboxes
    13	    (reached_account_inboxes + followers_inboxes + relay_inboxes).uniq
    14	  end
    15	
    16	  private
    17	
    18	  def reached_account_inboxes
    19	    scope = Account.where(id: reached_account_ids)
    20	    inboxes_without_suspended_for(scope)
    21	  end
    22	
    23	  def reached_account_ids
    24	    # When the status is a reblog, there are no interactions with it
    25	    # directly, we assume all interactions are with the original one
    26	
    27	    if @status.reblog?
    28	      [reblog_of_account_id]
    29	    else
    30	      [
    31	        replied_to_account_id,
    32	        reblog_of_account_id,
    33	        quote_of_account_id,
    34	        mentioned_account_ids,
    35	        reblogs_account_ids,
    36	        quotes_account_ids,
    37	        favourites_account_ids,
    38	        replies_account_ids,
    39	      ].tap do |arr|
    40	        arr.flatten!
    41	        arr.compact!
    42	        arr.uniq!
    43	      end
    44	    end
    45	  end
    46	
    47	  def replied_to_account_id
    48	    @status.in_reply_to_account_id if distributable?
    49	  end
    50	
    51	  def quote_of_account_id
    52	    @status.quote&.quoted_account_id
    53	  end
    54	
    55	  def reblog_of_account_id
    56	    @status.reblog.account_id if @status.reblog?
    57	  end
    58	
    59	  def mentioned_account_ids
    60	    @status.mentions.pluck(:account_id)
    61	  end
    62	
    63	  # Beware: Quotes can be created without the author having had access to the status
    64	  def quotes_account_ids
    65	    @status.quotes.pluck(:account_id) if distributable? || unsafe?
    66	  end
    67	
    68	  # Beware: Reblogs can be created without the author having had access to the status
    69	  def reblogs_account_ids
    70	    @status.reblogs.rewhere(deleted_at: [nil, @status.deleted_at]).pluck(:account_id) if distributable? || unsafe?
    71	  end
    72	
    73	  # Beware: Favourites can be created without the author having had access to the status
    74	  def favourites_account_ids
    75	    @status.favourites.pluck(:account_id) if distributable? || unsafe?
    76	  end
    77	
    78	  # Beware: Replies can be created without the author having had access to the status
    79	  def replies_account_ids
    80	    @status.replies.pluck(:account_id) if distributable? || unsafe?
    81	  end
    82	
    83	  def followers_inboxes
    84	    scope = followers_scope
    85	    inboxes_without_suspended_for(scope)
    86	  end
    87	
    88	  def relay_inboxes
    89	    if @status.public_visibility?
    90	      Relay.enabled.pluck(:inbox_url)
    91	    else
    92	      []
    93	    end
    94	  end
    95	
    96	  def distributable?
    97	    @status.public_visibility? || @status.unlisted_visibility?
    98	  end
    99	
   100	  def unsafe?
   101	    @options[:unsafe]
   102	  end
   103	
   104	  def followers_scope
   105	    if @status.in_reply_to_local_account? && distributable?
   106	      @status.account.followers.or(@status.thread.account.followers.not_domain_blocked_by_account(@status.account))
   107	    elsif @status.direct_visibility? || @status.limited_visibility?
   108	      Account.none
   109	    else
   110	      @status.account.followers
   111	    end
   112	  end
   113	
   114	  def inboxes_without_suspended_for(scope)
   115	    scope.merge!(Account.without_suspended) unless unsafe?
   116	    scope.inboxes
   117	  end
   118	end

# frozen_string_literal: true

class BatchedRemoveStatusService < BaseService
  include Redisable

  # Delete multiple statuses and reblogs of them as efficiently as possible
  # @param [Enumerable<Status>] statuses An array of statuses
  # @param [Hash] options
  # @option [Boolean] :skip_side_effects Do not modify feeds and send updates to streaming API
  def call(statuses, **options)
    ActiveRecord::Associations::Preloader.new(
      records: statuses,
      associations: options[:skip_side_effects] ? :reblogs : [:account, :tags, reblogs: :account]
    ).call

    statuses_and_reblogs = statuses.flat_map { |status| [status] + status.reblogs }

    # The conversations for direct visibility statuses also need
    # to be manually updated. This part is not efficient but we
    # rely on direct visibility statuses being relatively rare.
    statuses_with_account_conversations = statuses.select(&:direct_visibility?)

    ActiveRecord::Associations::Preloader.new(
      records: statuses_with_account_conversations,
      associations: [mentions: :account]
    ).call

    statuses_with_account_conversations.each(&:unlink_from_conversations!)

    # We do not batch all deletes into one to avoid having a long-running
    # transaction lock the database, but we use the delete method instead
    # of destroy to avoid all callbacks. We rely on foreign keys to
    # cascade the delete faster without loading the associations.
    statuses_and_reblogs.each_slice(50) { |slice| Status.unscoped.where(id: slice.pluck(:id)).delete_all }

    # Since we skipped all callbacks, we also need to manually
    # deindex the statuses
    if Chewy.enabled?
      Chewy.strategy.current.update(StatusesIndex, statuses_and_reblogs)
      Chewy.strategy.current.update(PublicStatusesIndex, statuses_and_reblogs)
    end

    return if options[:skip_side_effects]

    # Batch by source account
    statuses_and_reblogs.group_by(&:account_id).each_value do |account_statuses|
      account = account_statuses.first.account

      next unless account

      unpush_from_home_timelines(account, account_statuses)
      unpush_from_list_timelines(account, account_statuses)
    end

    # Cannot be batched
    @status_id_cutoff = Mastodon::Snowflake.id_at(2.weeks.ago)
    redis.pipelined do |pipeline|
      statuses.each do |status|
        unpush_from_public_timelines(status, pipeline)
      end
    end
  end

  private

  def unpush_from_home_timelines(account, statuses)
    account.followers_for_local_distribution.includes(:user).reorder(nil).find_each do |follower|
      statuses.each do |status|
        FeedManager.instance.unpush_from_home(follower, status)
      end
    end
  end

  def unpush_from_list_timelines(account, statuses)
    account.lists_for_local_distribution.select(:id, :account_id).includes(account: :user).reorder(nil).find_each do |list|
      statuses.each do |status|
        FeedManager.instance.unpush_from_list(list, status)
      end
    end
  end

  def unpush_from_public_timelines(status, pipeline)
    return unless status.public_visibility? && status.id > @status_id_cutoff

    payload = { event: :delete, payload: status.id.to_s }.to_json

    pipeline.publish('timeline:public', payload)
    pipeline.publish(status.local? ? 'timeline:public:local' : 'timeline:public:remote', payload)

    if status.media_attachments.any?
      pipeline.publish('timeline:public:media', payload)
      pipeline.publish(status.local? ? 'timeline:public:local:media' : 'timeline:public:remote:media', payload)
    end

    status.tags.map { |tag| tag.name.downcase }.each do |hashtag|
      pipeline.publish("timeline:hashtag:#{hashtag}", payload)
      pipeline.publish("timeline:hashtag:#{hashtag}:local", payload) if status.local?
    end
  end
end

file.content:
# frozen_string_literal: true

class Vacuum::StatusesVacuum
  include Redisable

  def initialize(retention_period)
    @retention_period = retention_period
  end

  def perform
    vacuum_statuses! if @retention_period.present?
  end

  private

  def vacuum_statuses!
    statuses_scope.in_batches do |statuses|
      # Side-effects not covered by foreign keys, such
      # as the search index, must be handled first.
      statuses.direct_visibility
        .includes(mentions: :account)
        .find_each(&:unlink_from_conversations!)
      if Chewy.enabled?
        remove_from_index(statuses.ids, 'chewy:queue:StatusesIndex')
        remove_from_index(statuses.ids, 'chewy:queue:PublicStatusesIndex')
      end

      # Foreign keys take care of most associated records for us.
      # Media attachments will be orphaned.
      statuses.delete_all
    end
  end

  def statuses_scope
    Status.unscoped.kept
      .joins(:account).merge(Account.remote)
      .where(statuses: { id: ...retention_period_as_id })
  end

  def retention_period_as_id
    Mastodon::Snowflake.id_at(@retention_period.ago, with_random: false)
  end

  def remove_from_index(status_ids, index)
    with_redis { |redis| redis.sadd(index, status_ids) }
  end
end

===== delete_account_service purge =====
    purge_polls!
    purge_generated_notifications!
    purge_favourites!
    purge_bookmarks!
    purge_feeds!
    purge_other_associations!

    @account.destroy unless keep_account_record?
  end

  def purge_statuses!
    @account.statuses.reorder(nil).where.not(id: reported_status_ids).in_batches do |statuses|
      BatchedRemoveStatusService.new.call(statuses, skip_side_effects: skip_side_effects?)
    end
  end

  def purge_mentions!
    @account.mentions.reorder(nil).where.not(status_id: reported_status_ids).in_batches.delete_all
  end

  def purge_media_attachments!
    @account.media_attachments.find_each do |media_attachment|
      next if keep_account_record? && reported_status_ids.include?(media_attachment.status_id)

      media_attachment.destroy
    end
  end

  def purge_polls!
    @account.polls.reorder(nil).where.not(status_id: reported_status_ids).in_batches.delete_all
  end

  def purge_generated_notifications!
    # By deleting polls and statuses without callbacks, we've left behind
    # polymorphically associated notifications generated by this account

    Notification.where(from_account: @account).in_batches.delete_all
    NotificationRequest.where(from_account: @account).in_batches.delete_all
  end

  def purge_favourites!
    @account.favourites.in_batches do |favourites|
      ids = favourites.pluck(:status_id)
      StatusStat.where(status_id: ids).update_all('favourites_count = GREATEST(0, favourites_count - 1)')
      Chewy.strategy.current.update(StatusesIndex, ids) if Chewy.enabled?
      Rails.cache.delete_multi(ids.map { |id| "statuses/#{id}" })
      favourites.delete_all
    end
  end

        end.join(','))

      end

      io.write(append)
    end
  end

content.text:
I now have a complete, source-verified picture of the Status contract and its dependents. Here is the audit.

---

## Step 1 — Orientation

**Project:** Mastodon — a federated (ActivityPub) social server. Ruby on Rails backend + React/TypeScript frontend. 4,102 files, ~17.5k symbols indexed.

**Layout** (`app/`):
- `app/models/` — ActiveRecord domain models + `app/models/concerns/` (shared mixins).
- `app/services/` — write-path business operations (`PostStatusService`, `RemoveStatusService`, …).
- `app/workers/` — Sidekiq async jobs (`app/workers/activitypub/` for federation delivery).
- `app/lib/` — plumbing: `app/lib/activitypub/` (federation in/out), `feed_manager.rb`, `status_reach_finder.rb`, `status_cache_hydrator.rb`.
- `app/controllers/` (REST API under `api/v1`, ActivityPub endpoints), `app/serializers/`, `app/policies/`, `app/presenters/`.
- `lib/mastodon/cli/` — admin CLI; `db/migrate/` — schema.

**Central content model:** `Status` at `app/models/status.rb:34` (`statuses` table). It is the second-biggest hub in the codebase (Account is first) — 124–191 callers. Everything users post flows through it: feeds, notifications, federation, moderation, search, trends. It is built on shared concerns (`app/models/concerns/status/*.rb`) and the `Account` model it belongs to.

---

## Step 2 — The Status contract and what it's built on

**Model:** `app/models/status.rb:34`. Key surface:
- **Base/cross-cutting includes:** `Cacheable` (`:35`), `Discard::Model` (`:36`, soft-delete via `deleted_at`, `:66`), `Paginable` (`:37`), `RateLimitable` (`:38`, `rate_limit` at `:64`).
- **Status concerns** (`app/models/concerns/status/`):
  - `FaspConcern` — `fasp_concern.rb:3`: `after_commit` create/update/destroy hooks announcing content lifecycle to FASP providers.
  - `FetchRepliesConcern` — `fetch_replies_concern.rb:3`: remote-reply backfill scopes + `should_fetch_replies?`.
  - `SafeReblogInsert` — `safe_reblog_insert.rb:3`: overrides AR `_insert_record` so reblogs of discarded statuses can't be inserted (DB-level `WHERE deleted_at IS NULL`).
  - `SearchConcern` — `search_concern.rb:3`: `indexable` scope, `searchable_by/_text/_properties` (drives Chewy index).
  - `SnapshotConcern` — `snapshot_concern.rb:3`: `has_many :edits` (StatusEdit), `build_snapshot`/`snapshot!` (edit history).
  - `ThreadingConcern` — `threading_concern.rb:3`: `ancestors`/`descendants`/`self_replies`, recursive-CTE tree walks, `permitted_statuses_from_ids`.
  - `Visibility` — `visibility.rb:3`: `enum visibility {public,unlisted,private,direct,limited}`, `distributable?`/`hidden?`, distributable/list-eligible scopes, `set_visibility`.
  - `InteractionPolicyConcern` — `interaction_policy_concern.rb:3`: `composed_of :quote_interaction_policy`, `quote_policy_for_account`.
- **Associations other records hang off** (`status.rb:75-118`): `account` (`:77`); `application`; `conversation` + `owned_conversation` (`:87`); media_attachments (`dependent: :nullify`, `:96`); poll/`preloadable_poll`; `favourites`/`bookmarks`/`mentions`/`tagged_objects` (`dependent: :destroy`); `reblogs` (`:91`, `dependent: :destroy`); `replies`/`thread` (self-join, `:83-93`); `quotes`/`quote` (`:98`,`:118`); `status_stat` (`:115`); `trend` (StatusTrend); `notification` (polymorphic `as: :activity`, `:114`); `edits` (via SnapshotConcern); `preview_cards_status` (`:112`); HABTM `tags` (`:110`).
- **Teardown contract a teammate must respect:**
  - Soft-delete is the default (`discard_column = :deleted_at`, `:66`); `default_scope { recent.kept }` (`:128`) hides discarded rows globally.
  - `discard_with_reblogs` (`:400`) discards a status + all its reblogs in one timestamp.
  - `before_destroy :unlink_from_conversations!, prepend: true` (`:178`, body `:406`) must run before `dependent: :destroy` cleanup.
  - Counter caches: `increment/decrement_counter_caches` (`:479`,`:487`) keep account/reblog/thread counts; webhooks on commit (`:495`,`:499`); FASP announces on commit.
  - `CACHEABLE_ASSOCIATIONS` (`:48`) + `cache_associated` (`:180`) define what gets eager-loaded/cached — changing associations ripples here.

---

## Step 3 — How a status is created and distributed

**Entry → persistence (inline):** `PostStatusService#call` `app/services/post_status_service.rb:42`
- `process_status!` (`:84`): builds `@account.statuses.new`, runs `ProcessMentionsService` (`:86`), `ProcessLinksService`/tags (`:89,:122`), `attach_quote!` (`:112`), antispam preflight, then `@status.save!` inside a transaction (`:97`). Snowflake ID + conversation/reply wiring happen in model callbacks (`status.rb:166-174`).

**Post-processing fan-out** — `postprocess_status!` `app/services/post_status_service.rb:162`:
| Step | Sync/async | Ref |
|---|---|---|
| Hashtag processing | inline | `:163` |
| Trend registration | inline | `:164` |
| `LinkCrawlWorker` | **async** | `:165` |
| `DistributionWorker` (local feeds) | **async** | `:166` |
| Email subscriptions | **async** (`EmailDistributionWorker`) | `:167,:184` |
| `ActivityPub::DistributionWorker` (federation out) | **async** | `:168` |
| `PollExpirationNotifyWorker` | **async** | `:169` |
| `ActivityPub::QuoteRequestWorker` | **async** | `:170` |

**Local distribution:** `DistributionWorker#perform` `app/workers/distribution_worker.rb:8` → `FanOutOnWriteService#call` `app/services/fan_out_on_write_service.rb:12`:
- `deliver_to_self!` (`:71`) → `FeedManager#push_to_home`; notifications: `notify_quoted_account!`/`notify_mentioned_accounts!`/`notify_about_update!` (`:75-112`, async `LocalNotificationWorker`/`PushUpdateWorker`); `deliver_to_all_followers!`/`deliver_to_lists!`/`deliver_to_mentioned_followers!` (`:114-144`, async `FeedInsertWorker`); hashtag + public stream redis publishes (`:146-163`).

**Federation out:** `ActivityPub::DistributionWorker#perform` `app/workers/activitypub/distribution_worker.rb:11` → inboxes from `StatusReachFinder#inboxes` `app/lib/status_reach_finder.rb:12`, delivered via `ActivityPub::DeliveryWorker` (async).

**Inbound federation (remote create):** `ActivityPub::Activity::Create#create_status` `app/lib/activitypub/activity/create.rb:17` (and `Update`/`Announce`/`Delete` siblings).

---

## Step 4 — Every dependent of the Status contract (exhaustive, by area)

> Verified from `sense_graph` callers (185 resolved) + `sense_blast` (173 direct, 322 affected symbols). Excludes pure DB migrations/mailer-previews/specs unless behavior-bearing.

### A. Feeds & timelines
- `FeedManager#clear_from_home` `app/lib/feed_manager.rb:231`, `#clear_from_list` `:251`, `#clear_from_lists` `:271` — purge status from redis feeds; `push_to_home`/`unpush_from_home`/`unpush_from_list` are the feed write/erase API used by fan-out/removal.
- `FanOutOnWriteService` `app/services/fan_out_on_write_service.rb:12` — inserts into home/list/mention/public streams.
- `FeedInsertWorker#perform` `app/workers/feed_insert_worker.rb:7` — async per-recipient feed insert; checks `StatusFilter`.
- `Feed#from_redis` `app/models/feed.rb:22` — hydrates Status from feed IDs.
- `PublicFeed` scopes `app/models/public_feed.rb:88,92,96,100,104,108,112,116` — public/local/remote/media/language/account-filter timeline queries.
- `TagFeed#tagged_with_any_scope` `app/models/tag_feed.rb:51`, `#tagged_with_all_scope` `:55`, `#tagged_with_none_scope` `:59` — hashtag timelines.
- `LinkFeed#attached_to_preview_card` `app/models/link_feed.rb:42` — link timeline.
- `AccountStatusesFilter` `app/lib/account_statuses_filter.rb:34,48,63,78,82,86,90,94` — per-account profile timeline scoping (used by outbox + API).
- `PushUpdateWorker#perform` `app/workers/push_update_worker.rb:7` — pushes status update to streaming API.
- Timeline API controllers: `Api::V1::Timelines::HomeController#preloaded_home_statuses` `app/controllers/api/v1/timelines/home_controller.rb:31`, `ListController` `list_controller.rb:27`, `PublicController` `public_controller.rb:31`, `TagController` `tag_controller.rb:25`, `LinkController` `link_controller.rb:24`.

### B. Federation (ActivityPub)
- `ActivityPub::DistributionWorker#perform` `app/workers/activitypub/distribution_worker.rb:11` — outbound create/announce delivery.
- `ActivityPub::StatusUpdateDistributionWorker#perform` `app/workers/activitypub/status_update_distribution_worker.rb:6` — outbound edits.
- `ActivityPub::DistributePollUpdateWorker#perform` `app/workers/activitypub/distribute_poll_update_worker.rb:9` — poll update delivery.
- `StatusReachFinder#inboxes` `app/lib/status_reach_finder.rb:12` — computes delivery audience (visibility-gated).
- `ActivityPub::Activity::Create` `app/lib/activitypub/activity/create.rb:17,45,87,93,298,426` — inbound new status (+ thread/attachment resolution).
- `ActivityPub::Activity::Update#update_status` `app/lib/activitypub/activity/update.rb:29` and `ActivityPub::ProcessStatusUpdateService#handle_explicit_update!` `app/services/activitypub/process_status_update_service.rb:42`, `#update_media_attachments!` `:87` — inbound edits + snapshots.
- `ActivityPub::Activity::Delete#delete_status` `app/lib/activitypub/activity/delete.rb:45` — inbound delete.
- `ActivityPub::Activity::Announce#perform` `app/lib/activitypub/activity/announce.rb:4`, `#reblog_of_local_status?` `:85` — inbound reblog.
- `ActivityPub::Activity::Undo#try_undo_announce` `app/lib/activitypub/activity/undo.rb:31`, `#undo_announce` `:72`, `#undo_like` `:103` — inbound undo.
- `ActivityPub::Activity::QuoteRequest#reject_quote_request!` `app/lib/activitypub/activity/quote_request.rb:55`, `#accept_quote_request!` `:21` — quote handshake.
- `ActivityPub::Activity::Like#perform` `app/lib/activitypub/activity/like.rb:4`, `Flag#perform` `flag.rb:6`, `Remove#remove_featured` `remove.rb:26`.
- `ActivityPub::Activity#status_from_uri` `app/lib/activitypub/activity.rb:70`, `#status_from_object` `:106`, `#quote_from_request_json` `:125` — URI→Status resolution shared by inbound activities.
- `ActivityPub::FetchRemoteStatusService#call` `app/services/activitypub/fetch_remote_status_service.rb:11,86` — fetch a remote status.
- `ActivityPub::FetchAllRepliesService#filter_replies` `app/services/activitypub/fetch_all_replies_service.rb:17` + `ActivityPub::FetchAllRepliesWorker` `app/workers/activitypub/fetch_all_replies_worker.rb:19`, `FetchRepliesWorker` `fetch_replies_worker.rb:9` — reply backfill (FetchRepliesConcern).
- `ActivityPub::VerifyQuoteService#fetch_quoted_post_if_needed!` `app/services/activitypub/verify_quote_service.rb:69`.
- `ThreadResolveWorker#perform` `app/workers/thread_resolve_worker.rb:9`, `MentionResolveWorker#perform` `app/workers/mention_resolve_worker.rb:10`, `TaggedCollectionResolveWorker#perform` `app/workers/tagged_collection_resolve_worker.rb:10`.
- Outbound endpoints: `ActivityPub::OutboxesController#set_statuses` `app/controllers/activitypub/outboxes_controller.rb:56`, `RepliesController#set_replies` `replies_controller.rb:32`, `CollectionsController#set_items` `collections_controller.rb:34`.
- Serializers: `ActivityPub::AnnounceNoteSerializer.serializer_for` `app/serializers/activitypub/announce_note_serializer.rb:4`, `OutboxSerializer.serializer_for` `outbox_serializer.rb:4` (+ `CreateNoteSerializer`/`DeleteNoteSerializer`/`UndoAnnounceSerializer` selected in distribution/removal).

### C. Notifications
- `NotifyService::BaseCondition#statuses_that_mention_sender` `app/services/notify_service.rb:76` — filtering decisions from status mentions.
- `LocalNotificationWorker` / `Notification` polymorphic `activity` (status.rb:114) — mention/reblog/quote/update notifications created in `FanOutOnWriteService` (`:78,:83,:102,:108`).
- Notification API: `Api::V1::NotificationsController#load_notifications` `app/controllers/api/v1/notifications_controller.rb:47`, `Api::V2::NotificationsController#load_notifications` `app/controllers/api/v2/notifications_controller.rb:66`, `Api::V1::Notifications::RequestsController#load_requests` `app/controllers/api/v1/notifications/requests_controller.rb:54`.
- `EmailDistributionWorker#perform` `app/workers/email_distribution_worker.rb:9` — email digest of new statuses.
- `PublishScheduledAnnouncementWorker#refresh_status_ids!` `app/workers/publish_scheduled_announcement_worker.rb:24`.

### D. Moderation
- `StatusPolicy` `app/policies/status_policy.rb:4` — show/quote/reblog/favourite/destroy/update authorization (the visibility gate).

## Step 5 — How status identity & visibility are guarded

**Existence / current (not discarded):**
- `default_scope { recent.kept }` `app/models/status.rb:128` — every plain query hides `deleted_at IS NOT NULL`; callers needing tombstones must use `Status.unscoped` (e.g. `discard_with_reblogs` `:402`, `UserCleanupScheduler` `:30`, `Vacuum` `:35`, `reblogs_map` `:370`).
- `SafeReblogInsert._insert_record` `app/models/concerns/status/safe_reblog_insert.rb:20` — DB-level guarantee that a reblog can't point at a discarded status (`WHERE deleted_at IS NULL`).
- `DistributionWorker` `app/workers/distribution_worker.rb:12` & `ActivityPub::DistributionWorker` `app/workers/activitypub/distribution_worker.rb:16` rescue `ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound` — tolerate a status deleted before the job runs.
- `FanOutOnWriteService#check_race_condition!` `app/services/fan_out_on_write_service.rb:29` — re-raises `RaceConditionError` if `visibility.nil?` (re-queues with full object).
- `with_redis_lock("distribute:#{id}")` in `DistributionWorker:9` and `RemoveStatusService:22` — serialize create-vs-delete on the same status.
- `RemoveStatusService#permanently?` `app/services/remove_status_service.rb:162` (+ `Status#reported?` `status.rb:274`) — gate hard-delete vs preserve-for-moderation.
- `RevokeQuoteService`/quote `accepted?` checks in fan-out (`:76`) and removal (`:51`).

**Visibility / authorization:**
- `Status::Visibility` `app/models/concerns/status/visibility.rb` — `distributable?`/`hidden?` (`:31,:27`), `distributable_visibility`/`list_eligible_visibility`/`not_direct_visibility` scopes (`:12-14`), `set_visibility` default (`:39`).
- `StatusPolicy#show?` `app/policies/status_policy.rb:4` — author availability, mention/private/block/domain-block checks; `quote?`/`reblog?`/`favourite?`/`destroy?`/`update?` build on it.
- `StatusFilter#filtered?` `app/lib/status_filter.rb:11` — wraps `StatusPolicy.show?` + block/mute/silence; used by `FeedInsertWorker` and `ThreadingConcern#permitted_statuses_from_ids` `threading_concern.rb:14`.
- `StatusReachFinder` `app/lib/status_reach_finder.rb:48,65,70,75,80,96,104` — `distributable?`/`unsafe?` gate which interactors and followers receive federated activities; suspended accounts filtered unless `unsafe`.
- `AccountStatusesFilter` `app/lib/account_statuses_filter.rb` & `Admin::StatusFilter` / `Trends::StatusFilter` — scope-level visibility for profiles, admin, trends.
- `FanOutOnWriteService#broadcastable?` `:188` and visibility `case` `:50` — visibility decides public-stream + which feeds get the status.

## Step 6 — Blast radius of the contract change (ranked by risk)

`sense_blast`: **risk = high**, 173 direct callers, 322 affected symbols, 113 files.

**🔴 Highest risk — teardown / soft-delete semantics (you are changing exactly this):**
1. `RemoveStatusService` `app/services/remove_status_service.rb:16` — relies on `discard_with_reblogs`, `unlink_from_conversations!`, `reported?`, `permanently?`, every `dependent:` association, and reblog cascade. Any change to discard/destroy ordering breaks it.
2. `BatchedRemoveStatusService` `app/services/batched_remove_status_service.rb:10` — uses `delete_all` (bypasses callbacks) and manually replicates `unlink_from_conversations!` + de-index. If you move cleanup into callbacks, this silently skips it.
3. `Vacuum::StatusesVacuum#vacuum_statuses!` `app/lib/vacuum/statuses_vacuum.rb:16` — `delete_all` trusting FK cascade; comment notes media is orphaned. New associations without FK cascade leak rows.
4. `DeleteAccountService#purge_statuses!`/`purge_mentions!`/`purge_polls!`/`purge_favourites!` `app/services/delete_account_service.rb:160+` — bypasses callbacks, manually fixes counters/index.
5. `Scheduler::UserCleanupScheduler#clean_discarded_statuses!` `app/workers/scheduler/user_cleanup_scheduler.rb:29` — depends on `discarded` + `deleted_at` retention.
6. `SafeReblogInsert` `app/models/concerns/status/safe_reblog_insert.rb:20` & `discard_with_reblogs` `status.rb:400` — change to `deleted_at` column or discard mechanics breaks the custom INSERT and reblog cascade.
7. `before_destroy :unlink_from_conversations!` ordering (`status.rb:178`) + counter-cache callbacks (`:160-161,:479,:487`) — reordering/destroy-path change desyncs `statuses_count`/`replies_count`/`reblogs_count`.

**🟠 High — distribution & visibility derivations:**
8. `FanOutOnWriteService` `app/services/fan_out_on_write_service.rb` + `FeedManager` clear/unpush (`feed_manager.rb:231,251,271`) — visibility `case` + `broadcastable?`; redis feed keys assume current visibility scopes.
9. `StatusReachFinder` `app/lib/status_reach_finder.rb` — `distributable?`/`unsafe?` gating; over/under-delivery on federated deletes if visibility/discard semantics shift.
10. `StatusCacheHydrator` `app/lib/status_cache_hydrator.rb:29,35,55` + `CACHEABLE_ASSOCIATIONS`/`cache_associated` (`status.rb:48,180`) — association changes invalidate cached payload shape (note `cache_key` `v3:` `:190` may need bump).

I now have a complete, source-verified picture of the Status contract and its dependents. Here is the audit.

---

## Step 1 — Orientation

**Project:** Mastodon — a federated (ActivityPub) social server. Ruby on Rails backend + React/TypeScript frontend. 4,102 files, ~17.5k symbols indexed.

**Layout** (`app/`):
- `app/models/` — ActiveRecord domain models + `app/models/concerns/` (shared mixins).
- `app/services/` — write-path business operations (`PostStatusService`, `RemoveStatusService`, …).
- `app/workers/` — Sidekiq async jobs (`app/workers/activitypub/` for federation delivery).
- `app/lib/` — plumbing: `app/lib/activitypub/` (federation in/out), `feed_manager.rb`, `status_reach_finder.rb`, `status_cache_hydrator.rb`.
- `app/controllers/` (REST API under `api/v1`, ActivityPub endpoints), `app/serializers/`, `app/policies/`, `app/presenters/`.
- `lib/mastodon/cli/` — admin CLI; `db/migrate/` — schema.

**Central content model:** `Status` at `app/models/status.rb:34` (`statuses` table). It is the second-biggest hub in the codebase (Account is first) — 124–191 callers. Everything users post flows through it: feeds, notifications, federation, moderation, search, trends. It is built on shared concerns (`app/models/concerns/status/*.rb`) and the `Account` model it belongs to.

---

## Step 2 — The Status contract and what it's built on

**Model:** `app/models/status.rb:34`. Key surface:
- **Base/cross-cutting includes:** `Cacheable` (`:35`), `Discard::Model` (`:36`, soft-delete via `deleted_at`, `:66`), `Paginable` (`:37`), `RateLimitable` (`:38`, `rate_limit` at `:64`).
- **Status concerns** (`app/models/concerns/status/`):
  - `FaspConcern` — `fasp_concern.rb:3`: `after_commit` create/update/destroy hooks announcing content lifecycle to FASP providers.
  - `FetchRepliesConcern` — `fetch_replies_concern.rb:3`: remote-reply backfill scopes + `should_fetch_replies?`.
  - `SafeReblogInsert` — `safe_reblog_insert.rb:3`: overrides AR `_insert_record` so reblogs of discarded statuses can't be inserted (DB-level `WHERE deleted_at IS NULL`).
  - `SearchConcern` — `search_concern.rb:3`: `indexable` scope, `searchable_by/_text/_properties` (drives Chewy index).
  - `SnapshotConcern` — `snapshot_concern.rb:3`: `has_many :edits` (StatusEdit), `build_snapshot`/`snapshot!` (edit history).
  - `ThreadingConcern` — `threading_concern.rb:3`: `ancestors`/`descendants`/`self_replies`, recursive-CTE tree walks, `permitted_statuses_from_ids`.
  - `Visibility` — `visibility.rb:3`: `enum visibility {public,unlisted,private,direct,limited}`, `distributable?`/`hidden?`, distributable/list-eligible scopes, `set_visibility`.
  - `InteractionPolicyConcern` — `interaction_policy_concern.rb:3`: `composed_of :quote_interaction_policy`, `quote_policy_for_account`.
- **Associations other records hang off** (`status.rb:75-118`): `account` (`:77`); `application`; `conversation` + `owned_conversation` (`:87`); media_attachments (`dependent: :nullify`, `:96`); poll/`preloadable_poll`; `favourites`/`bookmarks`/`mentions`/`tagged_objects` (`dependent: :destroy`); `reblogs` (`:91`, `dependent: :destroy`); `replies`/`thread` (self-join, `:83-93`); `quotes`/`quote` (`:98`,`:118`); `status_stat` (`:115`); `trend` (StatusTrend); `notification` (polymorphic `as: :activity`, `:114`); `edits` (via SnapshotConcern); `preview_cards_status` (`:112`); HABTM `tags` (`:110`).
- **Teardown contract a teammate must respect:**
  - Soft-delete is the default (`discard_column = :deleted_at`, `:66`); `default_scope { recent.kept }` (`:128`) hides discarded rows globally.
  - `discard_with_reblogs` (`:400`) discards a status + all its reblogs in one timestamp.
  - `before_destroy :unlink_from_conversations!, prepend: true` (`:178`, body `:406`) must run before `dependent: :destroy` cleanup.
  - Counter caches: `increment/decrement_counter_caches` (`:479`,`:487`) keep account/reblog/thread counts; webhooks on commit (`:495`,`:499`); FASP announces on commit.
  - `CACHEABLE_ASSOCIATIONS` (`:48`) + `cache_associated` (`:180`) define what gets eager-loaded/cached — changing associations ripples here.

**Entry → persistence (inline):** `PostStatusService#call` `app/services/post_status_service.rb:42`

- `DistributionWorker` `app/workers/distribution_worker.rb:12` & `ActivityPub::DistributionWorker` `app/workers/activitypub/distribution_worker.rb:16` rescue `ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound` — tolerate a status deleted before the job runs.
